name: Ike
description: Ike — Eisenhower-quadrant time log. Rails JSON API + web dashboard backing the macOS widget.

RAILS_MASTER_KEY.description: Decrypts config/credentials.yml.enc and provides secret_key_base. Inherited from the pipeline's parent app for review apps.

APP_HOST.description: Host for magic-link URLs and host authorization. Leave unset on review apps — they fall back to HEROKU_APP_NAME.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Populated automatically for review apps; used as the magic-link host when APP_HOST is unset.

SOLID_QUEUE_IN_PUMA.description: Run the Solid Queue worker inside the web dyno (single-dyno setup).

MAIL_FROM.description: Default From address for outgoing mail.

SMTP_ADDRESS.description: SMTP host (any provider). Required for magic-link email to actually send.
